Based on the search results, I found relevant information about Booking.com Partner API reservation objects and documentation:

## Key Documentation Resources

The Booking.com Connectivity APIs enable Connectivity Partners to send and retrieve data for properties listed on Booking.com, allowing them to manage room availability, reservations, prices, and many other things using their own systems.

## Reservations API Overview

The Reservations API module serves to retrieve and update reservations info available on Booking.com. The messages are classified as new booking confirmation, modification to an existing booking, or cancellation. Regardless of the category, the reservations API provides the data in a common format.

## Data Structure Details

The response body contains the following high-level root elements: Reservation-level details and Customer details. A reservation may include several units of rooms, apartments or villas. Each reservation or booking is specific to exactly one property.

## Official Documentation Location

The primary documentation for the Booking.com Connectivity APIs, including detailed reservation object field specifications, is available at `https://developers.booking.com/connectivity/docs`. This includes specific sections for the Reservations API at `https://developers.booking.com/connectivity/docs/reservations-api/`.

**Note:** Access to Booking.com's API documentation requires partnership status. You would need to be an approved Connectivity Partner to access the complete detailed field specifications and data structure documentation.

I found search results related to the Channex.io API documentation for booking reservations. Here's what I found:

## Key Information Found:

Booking CRS is an API and UI which allows the user to create, modify and cancel bookings at Channex.io.

### Push Booking Fields

The status field is required and can be one of three values: new, modified, cancelled.

For creating a booking push, the API accepts the following key fields:

- provider_code (required) - Your unique provider code. Under test, use "OpenChannel"
- hotel_code (required) - Hotel Code used at Mapping details
- ota_name (optional) - OTA Unique Code. If your system passes bookings from 3rd party OTA, field is required.
- reservation_id (optional) - Booking unique ID. For messages with status new can be empty, in which case Channex will generate unique UUID

### Room Fields

Booking rooms should be passed as Array of Objects. Each room object should contain information about room_type_code, occupancy, and days breakdown.

room_type_code (required) - Code of Room Type received at Get Rooms List operation.

rate_plan_code (required) - Rate Plan Code received at Get Rooms List operation.

For complete and detailed documentation with all available fields, you can visit the Channex.io documentation which contains information about their services and API with examples, object model explanations, code snippets and integration best practices.

Based on the web search results, I found comprehensive information about SiteMinder's booking reservation data fields and schema. Here's what I found:

## SiteConnect Reservation Data Schema

The OTA_HotelResNotifRQ message carries reservation data from your booking channel to SiteMinder. Each message contains exactly one reservation (new booking, modification, or cancellation).

### Key Reservation Data Fields

Booking channel reference numbers have a maximum of 64 characters. The schema includes:

- **Comments and Notes**: Contains comment for the reservation, holds the actual comment, and includes the content of the comment. PCI sensitive data is prohibited.

- **Pricing Information**: Total amount for the reservation includes all RoomStays and any additional fees or charges that apply. Use ISO 4217 currency codes, and at least one of AmountAfterTax or AmountBeforeTax must be set.

- **Tax Details**: Contains details of the taxes applied and contains specific tax information.

- **Guest and Document Holder Info**: The name of the document holder in unformatted text (Mr. Sam Jones). If no DocHolderName is included, the guest name fields will be assumed as the holder name.

- **Transportation Details**: Details about transport to the destination, contains transport mode details used by the guest for arrival, type of transport used for arrival, and transport provider's ID for the mode of transportation (e.g., Flight Number QF123).

### Reservation Status Handling

SiteMinder uses specific reservation status fields to differentiate between types of reservation actions. Modifications are identified using ResStatus Modify, while cancellations are marked with ResStatus Cancel.

For detailed API documentation and complete schema specifications, refer to the official SiteMinder Developer Guide at: https://developer.siteminder.com/siteminder-apis/channels/introduction/siteconnect/api-reference/reservations

content.content:
# Booking Object Data Structure

## Root Booking Object

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Yes | Unique booking identification |
| property_id | UUID | Yes | Associated property |
| booking_id | UUID | Yes | Internal booking reference |
| unique_id | String | Yes | Combined OTA code + reservation code |
| ota_reservation_code | String | Yes | "Original Reservation Code at platform" |
| ota_name | String | Yes | OTA source (Booking.com, Airbnb, etc.) |
| status | Enum | Yes | `new`, `modified`, or `cancelled` |
| arrival_date | ISO 8601 | Yes | Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| departure_date | ISO 8601 | Yes | Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| arrival_hour | HH:MM | Optional | Arrival time (24-hour format) |
| amount | String (numeric) | Yes | Total booking amount |
| currency | String | Yes | ISO currency code |
| notes | String | Optional | Guest special requests |
| payment_collect | Enum | Optional | `property`, `ota`, or null |
| payment_type | Enum | Optional | `credit_card`, `bank_transfer`, or null |
| ota_commission | String (numeric) | Optional | Commission charged by OTA |
| inserted_at | Timestamp | Yes | "when Booking Revision was received" |

## Nested Objects

### occupancy
```
{
  "adults": Integer,
  "children": Integer,
  "infants": Integer,
  "ages": Array<Integer> [optional - if children > 0]
}
```

### customer
```
{
  "name": String,
  "surname": String,
  "mail": String,
  "phone": String,
  "address": String [optional],
  "city": String [optional],
  "zip": String [optional],
  "country": String [optional - country code],
  "language": String [optional - language code],
  "company": Object [optional]
    {
      "title": String,
      "type": String,
      "number": String,
      "number_type": String
    }
}
```

### rooms (Array)
```
{
  "checkin_date": ISO 8601,
  "checkout_date": ISO 8601,
  "rate_plan_id": UUID [optional],
  "room_type_id": UUID [optional],
  "amount": String (numeric),
  "ota_unique_id": String [optional],
  "occupancy": Object (same structure as root),
  "guests": Array<Object> [optional]
    {
      "name": String,
      "surname": String
    },
  "days": Object<Date: Price>,
  "services": Array (see services section),
  "taxes": Array (see taxes section),
  "meta": Object (free-form JSON) [optional]
}
```

### services (Array)
```
{
  "name": String,
  "type": String,
  "nights": Integer,
  "persons": Integer,
  "price_mode": String (e.g., "Per stay", "Per night"),
  "price_per_unit": String (numeric),
  "total_price": String (numeric)
}
```

### taxes (Array)
```
{
  "name": String,
  "type": String (e.g., "fee", "tax", "city_tax"),
  "is_inclusive": Boolean,
  "total_price": String (numeric)
}
```

### guarantee (Object - PCI DSS Secured)
```
{
  "card_number": String (masked),
  "card_type": String (code: VI, MC, AX, etc.),
  "cardholder_name": String,
  "cvv": String (masked - "***"),
  "expiration_date": String (MM/YYYY),
  "is_virtual": Boolean,
  "meta": Object [optional]
    {
      "virtual_card_currency_code": String,
      "virtual_card_current_balance": String,
      "virtual_card_decimal_places": Integer,
      "virtual_card_effective_date": ISO 8601,
      "virtual_card_expiration_date": ISO 8601
    }
}
```

**Note:** Credit card data requires secure endpoint access and PCI DSS certification.

# SiteConnect Reservation Schema - Complete Field Reference

## Root Element
**OTA_HotelResNotifRQ** (Required)
- `@xmlns`: String (Required) - "http://www.opentravel.org/OTA/2003/05"
- `@ResStatus`: Enum (Required) - Commit, Modify, or Cancel
- `@EchoToken`: String (Required) - UUID format
- `@TimeStamp`: DateTime (Required) - ISO 8601
- `@Version`: Decimal (Required) - "1.0"

## Security Header (SOAP)
**SOAP-ENV:Header** (Required)
- **wsse:Security**
  - **wsse:UsernameToken**
    - `wsse:Username` (Required)
    - `wsse:Password` (Required) - Type: PasswordText

## Source Information
**POS** (Required)
- **Source** (1-2 instances)
  - **RequestorID** (First Source only)
    - `@Type`: Integer (Required) - "22"
    - `@ID`: String (Required) - Channel code
  - **BookingChannel** (Required)
    - `@Primary`: Boolean (Required)
    - **CompanyName**
      - `@Code`: String (Optional)

## Hotel Reservation Data
**HotelReservations** (Required)
- **HotelReservation** (Required)
  - `@CreateDateTime`: DateTime (Required) - ISO 8601
  - `@LastModifyDateTime`: DateTime (Conditional) - Required for Modify/Cancel
  - **UniqueID** (Required)
    - `@Type`: Integer (Required) - "14"
    - `@ID`: String (Required) - Alphanumeric only

## Room Stay Details
**RoomStays** (Required)
- **RoomStay** (1+ instances)
  - `@PromotionCode`: String (Optional)
  
  ### Room Type
  - **RoomTypes** (Optional)
    - **RoomType**
      - `@RoomTypeCode`: String (Required)
      - **RoomDescription**
        - `@Name`: String (Required)
  
  ### Rate Plan
  - **RatePlans** (Optional)
    - **RatePlan**
      - `@RatePlanCode`: String (Required)
      - **RatePlanDescription** (Required)
      - **Commission** (Optional)
        - **CommissionPayableAmount**
          - `@Amount`: Decimal (Required)
          - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required) - ISO 4217
      - **MealsIncluded** (0+ instances)
        - `@MealPlanCode`: Integer (Optional)
  
  ### Room Rates
  - **RoomRates** (Required)
    - **RoomRate**
      - `@RoomTypeCode`: String (Required)
      - `@RatePlanCode`: String (Optional)
      - `@NumberOfUnits`: Integer (Required) - "1"
      - **Rates**
        - **Rate** (0+ instances)
          - `@UnitMultiplier`: Integer (Required) - "1"
          - `@RateTimeUnit`: String (Required) - "Day"
          - `@EffectiveDate`: Date (Required) - YYYY-MM-DD
          - `@ExpireDate`: Date (Required) - YYYY-MM-DD
          - **Base**
            - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
            - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
            - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required)
            - **Taxes** (Optional)
              - **Tax** (0+ instances)
                - `@Type`: Enum (Optional) - inclusive, exclusive, cumulative
                - `@Code`: String (Optional)
                - `@Amount`: Decimal (Optional)
                - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Optional)
          - **Total** (Optional)
            - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
            - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
            - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required)
            - **Taxes** (Optional) - Same structure as Base
      - **ServiceRPHs** (Optional)
        - **ServiceRPH** (0+ instances)
          - `@RPH`: Integer (Required)

*At least one of AmountBeforeTax or AmountAfterTax required

  ### Guest & Occupancy
  - **GuestCounts** (Required)
    - **GuestCount** (1+ instances)
      - `@AgeQualifyingCode`: Integer (Required) - 10=Adult, 8=Child, 7=Infant
      - `@Count`: Integer (Required) - ≥1
      - `@Age`: Integer (Optional) - Children/infants only
  
  - **TimeSpan** (Required)
    - `@Start`: Date (Required) - YYYY-MM-DD
    - `@End`: Date (Required) - YYYY-MM-DD (min 1 night, max 749 days)
  
  - **Total** (Required)
    - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
    - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
    - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required)
    - **Taxes** (Optional) - Same structure
  
  - **BasicPropertyInfo** (Required)
    - `@HotelCode`: String (Required)
    - `@HotelName`: String (Optional)
  
  - **ServiceRPHs** (Optional)
    - **ServiceRPH** (1+ instances)
      - `@RPH`: Integer (Required)
  
  - **ResGuestRPHs** (Optional)
    - **ResGuestRPH** (1+ instances)
      - `@RPH`: Integer (Required)
  
  - **Comments** (Optional)
    - **Comment** (1+ instances)
      - **Text** (Required)
  
  - **SpecialRequests** (Optional)
    - **SpecialRequest** (0+ instances)
      - `@Name`: String (Required)
      - **Text** (Optional)

## Services (Extras & Charges)
**Services** (Optional)
- **Service** (1+ instances)
  - `@ServiceInventoryCode`: String (Required)
  - `@ID`: String (Optional)
  - `@ServiceRPH`: Integer (Optional) - Links to RoomStay/RoomRate
  - `@Inclusive`: Boolean (Required) - true
  - `@Quantity`: Integer (Required)
  - **Price** (Optional)
    - **Base** (Optional)
      - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
      - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
      - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Optional)
      - **Taxes** (Optional) - Same structure
    - **Total** (Required)
      - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
      - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
      - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required)
      - **Taxes** (Optional) - Same structure
    - **RateDescription** (Optional)
      - **Text** (Required)
  - **ServiceDetails** (Optional)
    - **TimeSpan**
      - `@Start`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
      - `@End`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD

## Guest Information
**ResGuests** (Required)
- **ResGuest** (1+ instances)
  - `@ResGuestRPH`: Integer (Optional)
  - `@PrimaryIndicator`: Boolean (Optional) - 1 or 0
  - `@ArrivalTime`: Time (Optional) - hh:mm:ss
  - **Profiles** (Required)
    - **ProfileInfo** (Required)
      - **Profile** (Required)
        - `@ProfileType`: Integer (Required) - 1=Customer
        - **Customer** (Required for Type 1)
          - **PersonName** (Required)
            - **NamePrefix** (Optional)
            - **GivenName** (Required)
            - **Surname** (Required)
          - **Telephone** (Optional)
            - `@PhoneNumber`: String (Required) - Max 32 chars
          - **Email** (Optional)
          - **Address** (Optional)
            - **AddressLine** (0-2 instances)
            - **CityName** (Optional)
            - **PostalCode** (Optional)
            - **StateProv** (Optional)
            - **CountryName** (Optional) - Max 64 chars
          - **CustLoyalty** (0+ instances)
            - `@ProgramID`: String (Required)
            - `@MembershipID`: String (Required)
            - `@ExpireDate`: Date (Optional)
          - **Document** (Optional)
            - `@DocID`: String (Required)
            - `@DocType`: String (Required)
            - `@DocHolderNationality`: String (Optional) - ISO 3166 A-2
            - `@BirthDate`: Date (Optional) - ISO 8601
            - `@BirthCountry`: String (Optional) - ISO 3166 A-2
            - `@BirthPlace`: String (Optional) - Max 64 chars
            - `@Gender`: String (Optional) - Female, Male, Unknown
            - `@EffectiveDate`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
            - `@ExpireDate`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
            - `@DocIssueAuthority`: String (Optional) - Max 64 chars
            - `@DocIssueLocation`: String (Optional) - Max 64 chars
            - `@DocIssueStateProv`: String (Optional) - 2-8 chars
            - `@DocIssueCountry`: String (Optional) - ISO 3166 A-2
            - **DocHolderName** (Optional)

## Transport Information
**ArrivalTransport** (Optional)
- **TransportInfo**
  - `@Type`: String (Optional)
  - `@ID`: String (Optional)
  - `@Time`: DateTime (Optional)

**DepartureTransport** (Optional)
- **TransportInfo**
  - `@Type`: String (Optional)
  - `@ID`: String (Optional)
  - `@Time`: DateTime (Optional)

## Global Reservation Info
**ResGlobalInfo** (Required)
- **HotelReservationIDs** (Optional)
  - **HotelReservationID**
    - `@ResID_Type`: String (Required) - "14"
    - `@ResID_Value`: String (Required) - Max 64 chars
- **Comments** (Optional)
  - **Comment** (1+ instances)
    - **Text** (Required)
- **Total** (Required)
  - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required) - ISO 4217
  - `@AmountBeforeTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
  - `@AmountAfterTax`: Decimal (Optional)*
  - **Taxes** (Optional)
    - **Tax** (1+ instances)
      - `@Type`: Enum (Optional)
      - `@Code`: String (Optional)
      - `@Amount`: Decimal (Optional)
      - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Optional)
  - **TPA_Extensions** (Optional)
    - **Total**
      - `@includesCommission`: Boolean (Required) - true or false

## Payment & Guarantee
**Guarantee** (Optional)
- **GuaranteesAccepted** (Required)
  - **GuaranteeAccepted** (Required)
    - **PaymentCard** (Required)
      - `@CardType`: String (Optional) - "1"
      - `@CardCode`: String (Required) - 2-char code
      - `@CardNumber`: String (Optional) - Max 19 digits
      - `@SeriesCode`: String (Optional)
      - `@ExpireDate`: String (Optional) - MMyy format
      - **CardHolderName** (Optional)
      - **ThreeDomainSecurity** (Optional)
        - **Results**
          - `@ThreeDSVersion`: String (Required)
          - `@XID`: String (Optional) - For 3DS 1.x.x
          - `@DSTransactionID`: String (Optional) - For 3DS 2.x.x
          - `@CAVV`: String (Required)
          - `@ECI`: String (Required)
          - `@PAResStatus`: String (Optional)
          - `@SignatureVerification`: String (Optional)
          - `@Enrolled`: String (Optional)
      - **TPA_Extensions** (Optional)
        - **VirtualCreditCard**
          - `@isVCC`: Boolean (Required) - true
          - `@VCCActivationDate`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
          - `@VCCDeactivationDate`: Date (Optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
          - `@VCCCurrentBalance`: Decimal (Optional)
          - `@VCCCurrencyCode`: String (Optional) - ISO 4217

**DepositPayments** (Optional)
- **GuaranteePayment** (Required)
  - **AcceptedPayments** (Optional)
    - **AcceptedPayment** (Required)
      - **PaymentCard** - Same structure as Guarantee
  - **AmountPercent** (Required if deposit present)
    - `@Amount`: Decimal (Required)
    - `@CurrencyCode`: String (Required) - ISO 4217

## Customer/Company/Agent Profiles
**Profiles** (Required in ResGlobalInfo)
- **ProfileInfo** (1-3 instances)
  - **Profile** (Required)
    - `@ProfileType`: Integer (Required) - 1=Customer, 3=Corporate, 4=Travel Agent
    - **UniqueID** (Optional - Types 3,4)
      - `@ID`: String (Required)
    - **Customer** (Type 1) - Same structure as ResGuest
    - **CompanyInfo** (Types 3,4)
      - **CompanyName** (Required)
      - **TelephoneInfo** (Optional)
        - `@PhoneNumber`: String (Required)
      - **Email** (Optional)
      - **AddressInfo** (Optional)
        - **AddressLine** (0-2 instances)
        - **CityName** (Optional)
        - **PostalCode** (Optional)
        - **StateProv** (Optional)
        - **CountryName** (Optional)

---

**Key Constraints:**
- Minimum 1-night stay required
- Maximum 749-day stay length
- UniqueID must be alphanumeric only
- Recommended UniqueID minimum 7 characters
- Commission is strongly recommended but optional
- All communication over HTTPS with TLS 1.2+

Based on the search results, I found information about Beds24's API booking reservation creation:

## Beds24 API Booking Reservation Creation

If a bookId is specified and exists, the booking will be modified. If bookId is not set, the booking will be added as a new booking.

### Key Fields for Creating Bookings

The JSON data is similar to that returned by getBookings. When creating new bookings:

- If unitId is not set for a new booking, the booking will be auto assigned into an available unit of the specified roomId type.
- It is not necessary to send unchanged fields when modifying a booking; it is better to only include the fields which have changed.

### Batch Creation

An array of up to 100 new bookings can be created using either the array or groupArray parameter. Only one of these can be specified at a time. The groupArray parameter will create a group of linked bookings.

### Invoice Items

For invoice management: New invoice items can be added by not including an invoiceId. Invoice items can be deleted by setting the description, status, qty and price to an empty string in one operation.

For detailed JSON schema documentation, sample JSON data is available at the endpoint for each method when you open it in a browser. To make testing easy you can paste your JSON data into the textarea at each endpoint URL and click submit. Additionally, in Swagger, try clicking the "schema" under GET /bookings to see all the fields you can get using this endpoint.

You can access the API documentation directly at `https://api.beds24.com/json/setBooking` for creating/modifying bookings.

I found information about the Booking.com Connectivity API reservation XML fields and price breakdown features. Here's what the search results show:

## Key XML Fields and Features

**Guest Count Fields:**
When you enable the "Include room-level guest count" feature, the API replaces the `<numberofguests>` element with `<guest_counts>` in the response. The "Include room-level guest counts (old)" feature returns the number of adults and children (with their ages) per room reservation.

**Price Breakdown Fields:**
When the "Include price details" feature is enabled, the API includes the VAT and city taxes details in the response. The response also adds the `price_details` element under the `reservation.room`.

**Advanced Price Details:**
The Payments Clarity Package v2 provides a detailed breakdown of each booking's total price, including tax details, and breaks down the amount based on the guest and the property's perspectives. When the Payments Clarity Package feature is enabled, the response contains information on specified taxes and charges.

**Room and Reservation Details:**
Basic reservation details include guest name, reservation ID, room ID, arrival and departure dates, room information (e.g. meal plan), price per day and total price.

These features can be enabled to customize the XML response structure according to your integration needs.

Based on the search results, I found comprehensive information about the OTA_HotelResNotifRQ standard. Here's what the search revealed:

## OTA_HotelResNotifRQ Overview

The OTA_HotelResNotifRQ message supports updating other systems with reservation data using a push model, where the originating system (typically a booking source like a GDS, CRS, or hotel agent) pushes data to another system.

## Key Booking Reservation Fields

The standard includes the following major field categories:

**Message-Level Attributes:**
- EchoToken, namespace (http://www.opentravel.org/OTA/2003/05), and other required attributes
- TimeStamp, Target, Version, ResStatus

**Core Reservation Elements:**
- ResGlobalInfo container for information affecting the entire reservation, including global comments, counts, reservation IDs, loyalty programs, and payment methods

**Hotel Reservation Components:**
- RoomStays element containing RoomStay details, with a maximum of one RoomStay per reservation
- Number of rooms booked, typically set to "1"
- Room bed type information (Double, Twin, Queen, King) referencing OpenTravel Code List BED

**Rate and Pricing Fields:**
- RatePlan details with maximum one occurrence
- Rate elements with EffectiveDate and ExpireDate attributes defining which dates rates apply to

**Guest Information:**
- Profile information details used to book the reservation
- PersonName fields including guest's first name

**Reservation Identification:**
- HotelReservationIDs containing OTA confirmation numbers for new reservations, and original confirmation numbers for modifications and cancellations

For a complete list of all fields, you may want to consult the actual XSD schema file or the detailed API documentation from providers like Booking.com or Expedia Group, which have comprehensive field references available.

# Channex Booking Push Data Structure

## Endpoint
POST to `https://secure-staging.channex.io/api/v1/channel_webhooks/open_channel/new_booking`

Header: `api-key: open_channel_api_key`

---

## Root Object

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| booking | Object | Yes | Contains all booking details |

---

## Booking Object Fields

### Core Booking Info
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| status | String | Yes | Values: `new`, `modified`, `cancelled` |
| provider_code | String | Yes | Use `OpenChannel` for testing |
| hotel_code | String | Yes | Property identifier from mapping |
| ota_name | String | Optional | OTA code if from third-party source |
| reservation_id | String | Optional | Booking unique ID; auto-generated if empty |
| notes | String | Optional | Guest special requests |
| meta | Object | Optional | Custom free-form metadata |

### Dates & Times
| Field | Type | Required | Format |
|-------|------|----------|--------|
| arrival_date | String | Yes | `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| departure_date | String | Yes | `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| arrival_hour | String | Optional | `HH:MM` (24-hour) |

### Payment Information
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| currency | String | Yes | ISO 4217 3-letter code |
| payment_collect | String | Optional | `ota` or `property` (default) |
| payment_type | String | Optional | `credit_card`, `bank_transfer`, or null |

---

## Customer Object (Sub-object)

| Field | Type | Max Length | Notes |
|-------|------|-----------|--------|
| name | String | 255 | Optional |
| surname | String | 255 | Required if customer included |
| country | String | 2 | ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 code |
| city | String | 255 | Optional |
| address | String | 255 | Optional |
| zip | String | 32 | Optional |
| mail | String | — | Valid email, optional |
| phone | String | 32 | Optional; recommend international format |
| language | String | 2 | Language locale code |
| company | Object | — | Optional business info |
| meta | Object | — | Optional custom data |

### Company Sub-object
| Field | Type | Max Length |
|-------|------|-----------|
| title | String | 255 |
| number | String | 255 |
| number_type | String | 255 |

---

## Guarantee Object (Credit Card)

**Warning:** Must use secure domain to protect PCI data.

| Field | Type | Required | Format |
|-------|------|----------|--------|
| expiration_date | String | Yes | `MM/YYYY` |
| cvv | String | Yes | 3-4 digits |
| cardholder_name | String | Yes | From card |
| card_type | String | Yes | e.g., `visa` |
| card_number | String | Yes | Full number |
| meta | Object | Optional | Virtual card details |

### Guarantee Meta (Virtual Cards)
| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| virtual_card_currency_code | String | Card currency |
| virtual_card_current_balance | Integer | Balance amount |
| virtual_card_decimal_places | Integer | Decimal precision |
| virtual_card_effective_date | String | `YYYY-MM-DD` activation date |
| virtual_card_expiration_date | String | `YYYY-MM-DD` expiry date |

---

## Rooms Array

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| index | Integer | Optional | Starts at 0; links to services |
| room_type_code | String | Yes | Code from mapping details |
| occupancy | Object | Yes | Adults, children, infants |
| guests | Array | Optional | Guest name objects |
| days | Array | Yes | Daily breakdown by date |
| meta | Object | Optional | Custom room data |

### Occupancy Sub-object
| Field | Type | Required |
|-------|------|----------|
| adults | Integer | Yes |
| children | Integer | Yes |
| infants | Integer | Yes |

### Days Array Items
| Field | Type | Required | Format |
|-------|------|----------|--------|
| date | String | Yes | `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| price | String/Integer | Yes | Daily rate |
| rate_plan_code | String | Yes | Code from mapping |

---

## Services Array (Extras/Fees)

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| excluded | Boolean | Optional | Add to total if true |
| type | String | Yes | `Meal`, `Fee`, or `Extra` |
| total_price | String | Yes | Full service cost |
| price_per_unit | String | Yes | Unit rate |
| price_mode | String | Yes | Per stay/night/person/person-night |
| persons | Integer | Yes | Associated person count |
| nights | Integer | Yes | Associated night count |
| name | String | Yes | Service description |
| room_index | Integer | Optional | Links to room index |
| applicable_date | String | Optional | `YYYY-MM-DD` service date |

---

## Deposits Array

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| amount | String/Integer | Yes | Charge amount |
| currency | String | Yes | ISO 4217 code |
| charged_at | String | Optional | Timestamp when charged |
| type | String | Yes | Payment method (free-form) |
| notes | String | Optional | Charge details |
| provider_meta | JSON | Optional | Processor transaction data |

---

## Complete Example Request
```json
{
  "booking": {
    "status": "new",
    "provider_code": "OpenChannel",
    "hotel_code": "HOTEL123",
    "ota_name": "booking_com",
    "reservation_id": "RES12345",
    "arrival_date": "2019-05-09",
    "departure_date": "2019-05-10",
    "arrival_hour": "10:00",
    "currency": "GBP",
    "payment_collect": "property",
    "payment_type": "credit_card",
    "customer": {
      "name": "John",
      "surname": "Doe",
      "country": "EN",
      "mail": "john@example.com",
      "phone": "+447749617211"
    },
    "guarantee": {
      "expiration_date": "10/2025",
      "cvv": "123",
      "cardholder_name": "John Doe",
      "card_type": "visa",
      "card_number": "4111111111111111"
    },
    "rooms": [
      {
        "index": 0,
        "room_type_code": "ROOM_STD",
        "occupancy": {"adults": 1, "children": 0, "infants": 0},
        "days": [
          {
            "date": "2019-05-09",
            "price": "100.00",
            "rate_plan_code": "RATE_BB"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "services": [
      {
        "type": "Fee",
        "total_price": "10.00",
        "price_per_unit": "10.00",
        "price_mode": "Per stay",
        "persons": 0,
        "nights": 0,
        "name": "Service Fee"
      }
    ],
    "deposits": [
      {
        "amount": "110.00",
        "currency": "GBP",
        "type": "credit_card"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

# setBooking JSON Schema

Based on the documentation, here's the complete field listing for booking creation:

## Authentication (Required)
- **apiKey** (string): API key from account settings
- **propKey** (string): Property key for the specific property

## Booking Details (Required for New)
- **roomId** (string): Room type identifier
- **firstNight** (string): Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **lastNight** (string): Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **status** (integer): Booking status code
- **numAdult** (integer): Adult count
- **numChild** (integer): Child count

## Unit Assignment (Optional)
- **unitId** (string): Specific unit; auto-assigned if omitted
- **roomQty** (string): Number of rooms

## Guest Information (Required for New)
- **guestTitle** (string): Mr, Mrs, etc.
- **guestFirstName** (string): Given name
- **guestName** (string): Surname
- **guestEmail** (string): Email address
- **guestPhone** (string): Landline number
- **guestMobile** (string): Mobile number
- **guestFax** (string): Fax number
- **guestAddress** (string): Street address
- **guestCity** (string): City name

- **guestCardName** (string): Cardholder name
- **guestCardExpiry** (string): MM/YY format
- **guestCardCVV** (string): Security code
- **guestCardNote** (string): Internal notes

- **guestArrivalTime** (string): Arrival time details
- **guestVoucher** (string): Discount or voucher info
- **guestComments** (string): Guest special requests
- **message** (string): General message
- **notes** (string): Internal notes (e.g., "VIP")

- **custom1-custom10** (string): Property-defined fields

- **price** (decimal): Total booking price
- **deposit** (decimal): Deposit amount
- **tax** (decimal): Tax amount
- **commission** (decimal): Commission amount

- **flagColor** (string): Hex color code for visual flag
- **flagText** (string): Flag label text
- **refererEditable** (string): Booking source identifier

- **bookId** (string): Required for modifying existing bookings

- **invoice** (array): Collection of invoice items
  - **invoiceId** (string): For modifications only
  - **description** (string): Item description
  - **status** (string): Invoice status
  - **qty** (integer): Quantity (positive for charges, negative for payments)
  - **qtyDecimal** (decimal): Alternative qty field, auto-converted
  - **price** (decimal): Unit price
  - **vatRate** (decimal): Tax percentage
  - **invoiceeId** (string): Invoicee identifier

# OTA_HotelResNotifRQ Message Schema Breakdown

## Root Element Attributes
| Attribute | Description | Required |
|-----------|-------------|----------|
| EchoToken | Reservation's Control Center UniqueID (guid) | Yes |
| TimeStamp | Transaction time in format yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ | Yes |
| Version | DirectConnect schema version (default "1.0") | Yes |
| Target | Always set to "Production" | Yes |
| ResStatus | Action type: Commit (new), Modify, or Cancel | Yes |

## POS Element (Point of Sale)
**Parent:** /OTA_HotelResNotifRQ | **Occurrences:** 1

### Source (Child of POS)
Contains channel information sourcing the booking.

**RequestorID** (Child of Source)
- Type attribute: Always "14"
- ID attribute: Partner ChannelID from Account form
- Required: Yes

**BookingChannel** (Child of Source)
- Type attribute: Always "7"
- Primary attribute: Always "true"
- CompanyName element: OTA name with Code attribute (unique channel identifier)
- Required: Yes

## HotelReservations Container
**Parent:** /OTA_HotelResNotifRQ | **Occurrences:** 1

Contains one reservation record per message.

### HotelReservation Element
**Occurrences:** 1

**Attributes:**
| Attribute | Details | Required |
|-----------|---------|----------|
| CreateDateTime | Booking time (yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ) | Yes |
| LastModifiedDateTime | Last update time (yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ) | Optional |
| ResStatus | Commit, Modify, or Cancel | Yes |

## RoomStays Container
**Parent:** HotelReservation | **Occurrences:** 1

### RoomStay Element
**Occurrences:** 1 (max)

Contains room details and pricing.

#### RoomTypes
**Occurrences:** 1

**RoomType** (Child) - **Occurrences:** 1

**Attributes:**
- RoomTypeCode: Room type identifier (Required)
- NumberOfUnits: Always "1" (Required)
- BedTypeCode: Bed type (e.g., Double, Twin, Queen, King) (Optional)

**Children:**
- RoomDescription/Name: Room type name (Required)

#### RatePlans
**Occurrences:** 1

**RatePlan** - **Occurrences:** 1 (max)

**Attributes:**
- RatePlanCode: Rate plan identifier (Required)

**Children:**
- Commission/CommissionPayableAmount: Commission details
  - Amount attribute: Commission value (Required)
  - CurrencyCode attribute: Currency code (Required)

- MealsIncluded (Optional)
  - Breakfast attribute: Boolean (Optional)
  - Lunch attribute: Boolean (Optional)
  - Dinner attribute: Boolean (Optional)

#### RoomRates
**Occurrences:** 1

**RoomRate** - **Occurrences:** 1

**Attributes:**
- RoomTypeCode: Room type identifier (Required)
- NumberOfUnits: Always "1" (Required)
- RatePlanCode: Rate type code (Required)
- PromotionVendorCode: Promotion vendor identifier (Optional)

**Rates Container:**
Includes Rate elements (1..n occurrences)

**Rate Element Attributes:**
- EffectiveDate: Rate start date (Required)
- ExpireDate: Rate end date (Required)

**Base Child:**
- CurrencyCode attribute: Currency (Required)
- AmountBeforeTax OR AmountAfterTax: Nightly rate (Required)

#### GuestCounts
**Occurrences:** 1

**GuestCount** - **Occurrences:** 1-2

**Attributes:**
- AgeQualifyingCode: 10=Adult, 8=Child (Required)
- Count: Number of guests (Required)

---

**Note:** The source document content was truncated; additional fields beyond what's shown here likely exist in the complete schema but aren't displayed in the provided excerpt.

content.content:
# Booking CRS API Schema

Based on the documentation provided, here's the complete data structure for booking operations:

## Root Object: `booking`

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `property_id` | UUID | Yes | Property identifier |
| `ota_reservation_code` | String | Yes | OTA booking reference |
| `ota_name` | String | Yes | Source system name (e.g., "Offline") |
| `arrival_date` | Date | Yes | Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
| `departure_date` | Date | Yes | Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
| `arrival_hour` | Time | No | Format: HH:MM |
| `status` | String | No | Values: "new", "modified", "cancelled" |
| `currency` | String | Yes | 3-letter code (e.g., "GBP") |
| `payment_collect` | String | No | e.g., "ota" |
| `payment_type` | String | No | e.g., "bank_transfer" |
| `ota_commission` | Decimal | No | Commission amount |
| `notes` | String | No | Guest notes |
| `meta` | Object | No | Custom key-value pairs |

## Nested Objects

### `customer`
- `name` (String)
- `surname` (String)
- `mail` (String)
- `phone` (String)
- `address` (String)
- `city` (String)
- `zip` (String)
- `country` (String, 2-letter code)
- `meta` (Object, optional)

### `rooms` (Array)
Each room object contains:
- `room_type_id` (UUID, required)
- `rate_plan_id` (UUID, required)
- `days` (Object: date → price mapping)
- `occupancy` (Object with adults, children, infants, ages array)
- `guests` (Array of {name, surname})
- `services` (Array)
- `taxes` (Array)
- `meta` (Object, optional)

### `services` (Array)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `is_inclusive` (Boolean)
- `nights` (Integer)
- `persons` (Integer)
- `price_mode` (String, e.g., "Per stay")
- `price_per_unit` (Decimal)
- `total_price` (Decimal)

### `deposits` (Array)
- `amount` (Decimal)
- `currency` (String)
- `charged_at` (ISO 8601 timestamp)
- `type` (String, e.g., "credit_card")
- `notes` (String)
- `meta` (Object)

### `taxes` (Array)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `is_inclusive` (Boolean)
- `nights` (Integer)
- `persons` (Integer)
- `price_mode` (String)
- `price_per_unit` (Decimal)
- `total_price` (Decimal)
- `version` (optional)

## Response Schema

Success responses return:
```
data.attributes.id (UUID)
data.attributes.booking_id (UUID)
data.attributes.unique_id (String)
data.attributes.revision_id (UUID)
data.attributes.status (String)
```

**Key Consideration**: The API operates asynchronously, so immediate follow-up queries may return 404 errors.

# B.XML Reservations API - Complete Field Inventory

## REQUEST PARAMETERS

| Parameter | Type | Purpose |
|-----------|------|---------|
| `request` | object | Root element for API calls |
| `id` | integer | Retrieve single reservation by ID |
| `hotel_id` / `hotel_ids` | integer | Filter by property ID(s) |
| `last_change` | datetime | "retrieve all reservations that were created, modified or cancelled since the specified date" |
| `limit` | integer | Maximum results to return (10-200) |

---

## RESERVATION-LEVEL FIELDS

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `booked_at` | datetime | "Contains the date and time the reservation was generated" |
| `commissionamount` | float | Commission owed to Booking.com |
| `currencycode` | string | ISO 4217 currency code |
| `date` | datetime | Reservation creation date |
| `hotel_id` | string | Property identifier |
| `hotel_name` | string | Property name |
| `id` | integer | Booking.com reservation ID |
| `modified_at` | datetime | Last modification timestamp |
| `status` | enum | `new`, `modified`, or `cancelled` |
| `time` | time | HH:MM:SS format booking time |
| `total_price` | integer | "total amount of room sales for this reservation" |
| `total_cancellation_fee` | integer | Fees for out-of-policy cancellations |

---

## CUSTOMER/BOOKER DETAILS

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `customer/address` | string | Booker address |
| `customer/cc_cvc` | integer | Credit card verification code |
| `customer/cc_current_balance` | integer | Virtual card balance |
| `customer/cc_expiration_date` | integer | Card expiry date |
| `customer/cc_name` | string | Cardholder name |
| `customer/cc_number` | integer | Card number |
| `customer/cc_type` | enum | Card issuer type |
| `customer/cc_activation_date` | datetime | Virtual card activation date |
| `customer/vcc_expiration_date` | datetime | Virtual card expiry |
| `customer/currencycode` | string | Virtual card currency |
| `customer/city` | string | Booker residence city |
| `customer/company` | string | Employer or booking entity |
| `customer/countrycode` | string | ISO 3166 country code |
| `customer/dc_issue_number` | integer | Maestro debit card issue # |
| `customer/dc_start_date` | datetime | Maestro debit card start date |
| `customer/email` | string | Booking contact email |
| `customer/first_name` | string | Booker first name |
| `customer/last_name` | string | Booker surname |
| `customer/preferred_language` | string | ISO language code preference |
| `customer/remarks` | string | Booker-provided comments |
| `customer/telephone` | string | Contact phone number |
| `customer/zip` | string | Postal code |

---

## ROOM DETAILS

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `room/arrival_date` | datetime | Guest check-in date |
| `room/departure_date` | datetime | Guest check-out date |
| `room/id` | integer | Booking.com room type ID |
| `room/name` | string | "room name as available on the website" |
| `room/guest_name` | string | Name(s) of room occupant(s) |
| `room/extra_info` | string | Room-specific information |
| `room/facilities` | string | "room facilities as displayed on the website" |
| `room/info` | string | "room information as available on the website" |
| `room/meal_plan` | string | Breakfast/lunch/dinner details |
| `room/smoking` | boolean | Smoking permission (0/1) |
| `room/max_children` | string | Maximum free child occupancy |
| `room/occupancy` | integer | Maximum occupancy for the rate |
| `room/numberofguests` | integer | Adult guests submitted by booker |
| `room/roomreservation_id` | integer | Room-level booking identifier |
| `room/commissionamount` | float | Room-specific commission |
| `room/currencycode` | string | Room pricing currency |
| `room/total_price` / `totalprice` | integer | Room cost for all nights |
| `room/remarks` | string | Room-level comments |

---

## PRICING & PAYMENT FIELDS

| Field | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `room/price[@date]` | integer | "price per night and rate category ID" |
| `room/price[@rate_id]` | integer | Rate category identifier |
| `room/price[@genius_rate]` | boolean | Genius discount applied |
